text:
Here's a summary of what happened:

**Action taken:** Sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with subject "Triage" listing all high-urgency triggered incidents.

**Reason:** There **are** 5 high-urgency triggered incidents — so I did NOT post to Slack.

**Incidents found (5 total):**
- PD-400 — SSO SCIM provisioning errors — page
- PD-401 — Primary DB failover is slow — page
- PD-403 — Primary DB failover is slow — page
- PD-411 — Onboarding funnel drop-off — page
- PD-418 — Search relevance regression — page

The email body contained each incident ID on its own line.

tool_calls.input: {"code":"ids = [inc[\"id\"] for inc in incidents]\nbody = \"\\n\".join(ids)\nemail.send_email(to=\"oncall@acme.io\", subject=\"Triage\", body=body)"}
